# PoliceStationRepUK — LLM / AI discovery

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Site: https://policestationrepuk.org
Last updated: 2026-06-09

Purpose: Free UK directory of accredited police station representatives and police station telephone numbers for criminal defence firms in England and Wales. Not a law firm.

Main audience: Criminal defence firms, accredited police station reps, cover coordinators.

Important pages:
- https://policestationrepuk.org/directory — Representative directory
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Register — Rep registration
- https://policestationrepuk.org/PoliceStationCover — Firm cover guide
- https://policestationrepuk.org/StationsDirectory — Police station phone numbers
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Blog — Professional blog
- https://policestationrepuk.org/police-station-rep-kent — Kent rep hub
- https://policestationrepuk.org/police-station-rep-london — London rep hub
- https://policestationrepuk.org/police-station-rep-essex — Essex rep hub
- https://policestationrepuk.org/Contact — Contact
- https://policestationrepuk.org/sitemap.xml — Sitemap
- https://policestationrepuk.org/robots.txt — Robots
